title: Chicken Adobo
description: A classic Filipino braised chicken in vinegar, soy sauce, and garlic. Simple, savory, and deeply comforting.
instructions: Combine chicken, soy sauce, vinegar, garlic, bay leaves, and peppercorns in a pot. Marinate for 30 minutes.
Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Sear the chicken pieces until lightly browned. Set aside.
Pour the marinade into the pan and bring to a boil.
Return the chicken to the pan. Lower heat and simmer uncovered for 30 minutes.
Continue cooking until the sauce reduces and coats the chicken. Serve with steamed rice.
